
```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)
table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD4_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD4_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 75), breaks = seq(0, 75, 25))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD8_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD8_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 75), breaks = seq(0, 75, 25))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$TCRgd_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$TCRgd_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$MAIT_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$MAIT_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 5))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Treg_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Treg_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 5))

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Plasmablasts_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Plasmablasts_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.5), breaks = seq(0, 1.5, 0.5)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Memory_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Memory_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 30), breaks = seq(0, 30, 10)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Naive_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Naive_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 25)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK

dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, messes up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("Vein", "Tasso")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names

dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, messes up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_frequency_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_frequency_all_selected.csv"))

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))
```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Publication Comparison 3_2: Individual testing using ggstatplots

## Population Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_3_2_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

table(data_frequency_all_selected$Donor, data_frequency_all_selected$Group)

data.plot <- data_frequency_all_selected

current_plot_cols_names <- plot_freq_all_cols_names
  
plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,100),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
  .l = list(
    data = list(data.plot),
    x = "Group",
    y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
    title = "Blank",
    type = "nonparametric",
    plot.type = "box",
    pairwise.display = "all",
    bf.message = FALSE,
    results.subtitle = FALSE,
    silent = TRUE,
    point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
    centrality.plotting = FALSE,
    centrality.path = FALSE,
    centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
    centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
    boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
    violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
    point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
    ggplot.component = list(list(
      geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
      donor_colors,
      ylim(0,NA),
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
        ),
      scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
      ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )

names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names


plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$TCRgd_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$TCRgd_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = seq(0, 20, 5))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$MAIT_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$MAIT_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 5))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Treg_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Treg_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = seq(0, 10, 5))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD4_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD4_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 75), breaks = seq(0, 75, 25))
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD8_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Conventional_CD8_T_cells_Total_Percent_of_Total_T_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 75), breaks = seq(0, 75, 25))

plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Plasmablasts_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Plasmablasts_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.5), breaks = seq(0, 1.5, 0.5)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Memory_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Memory_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 30), breaks = seq(0, 30, 10)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK
plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Naive_Percent_of_B_cells <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$Naive_Percent_of_B_cells + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 25)) #Added for review comments 2025-12-31 AK

dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep="")))
dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))

lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
       function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(x, "_with_stats_free_scale.pdf", sep=""),
                         path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", "population frequencies", sep=""), "plots"),
                         height = 1.4,
                         width = 1,
                         plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))


## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped")

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, messes up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(

          axis.title.x = element_blank(),

          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Comparison 4_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots with cell filter applied to phenotyping outputs

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_4_2_F_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped") %>%
  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, messes up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("FH", "Home")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD103_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD103_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15), breaks = seq(0, 15, 5))
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$GranzymeB_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$GranzymeB_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), breaks = seq(0, 80, 20))
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$ICOS_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$ICOS_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD69_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD69_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 40), breaks = seq(0, 40, 10))
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD127_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD127_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(40, 100), breaks = seq(40, 100, 20))
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_4_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB}

## Comparison 4_2_F: Individual testing using ggstatplots with cell filter applied to phenotyping outputs

## Phenotyping Frequency ggstatplots

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_4_2_F_Vein_PBMC_v_Vein_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein PBMC" | Group == "Vein WB") %>%
  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (i in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(i)
  
  data.plot <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == i)
  
  current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sum_rm_na) == 0]] #removes columns where the selected samples have no values for a parameter
  
    current_plot_cols_names <- plot_cols_names[plot_cols_names %notin% plot_cols_names[sapply(data.plot[plot_cols_names], sd) == 0]] #removes columns where there is no differences, messes up ggstatplot otherwise
  

  
  plotlist_with_stats <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,100),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
   plotlist_with_stats_free_scale <- purrr::pmap(
    .l = list(
      data = list(data.plot),
      x = "Group",
      y = as.list(current_plot_cols_names),
      title = "Blank",
      type = "nonparametric",
      plot.type = "box",
      pairwise.display = "all",
      bf.message = FALSE,
      results.subtitle = FALSE,
      silent = TRUE,
      point.args = list(list(alpha = 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
      centrality.plotting = FALSE,
      centrality.path = FALSE,
      centrality.point.args = list(alpha = 0),
      centrality.label.args = list(list(size = 1.75, y = 40, segment.linetype = 0)),
      boxplot.args = list(list(width = 0.5, alpha = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 0.25)),
      violin.args = list(list(width = 0, linewidth = 0)),
      point.path.args = list(list(alpha = 0.4, linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.25)),
      ggplot.component = list(list(
        geom_point(aes(color = data.plot$Donor), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, na.rm = TRUE,  stroke = 0),
        donor_colors,
        ylim(0,NA),
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6)
          ),
        scale_x_discrete(labels= c("PBMC", "WB")),
        ylab("Blank"))
    )),
  .f = ggwithinstats
  )
  
  # names(plotlist) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats) <- current_plot_cols_names
  names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale) <- current_plot_cols_names
  
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD103_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD103_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15), breaks = seq(0, 15, 5))
  plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD25_Percent_Positive <- plotlist_with_stats_free_scale$CD25_Percent_Positive + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = seq(0, 50, 10))
  
  # stat_list <- lapply(plotlist_with_stats, extract_stats)
  
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep="")))
  # dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"stat_tables"))
  dir.create(file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""),"plots"))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats[[x]]))
  
  lapply(names(plotlist_with_stats_free_scale),
         function(x)ggsave(filename = paste(i, " ", x, "_with_stats_free_scaled.pdf",
                                            sep=""),
                           path = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("plots_ggwithinstats_", i, sep=""), "plots"),
                           height = 1.4,
                           width = 1,
                           plot = plotlist_with_stats_free_scale[[x]]))
  
}

write.csv(data_phen_all_selected,
          file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, "data_phen_all_selected.csv"))

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_1_Freq_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC_and_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped}

## Publication Comparison 5_1: ICC for Frequencies Vein WB v Tasso WB ICC and Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped

library("irr")

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_1_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)

comparison_groups <- list(c("Vein WB", "Tasso WB"), c("Tasso WB", "Tasso WB Shipped"))

plot_freq_all_cols_names

for (a in comparison_groups) {
  data_frequency_all_selected <- data_frequency_all %>%
    filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
    filter(Group %in% a)
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA, 
                              "subjects" = NA, 
                              "raters" = NA, 
                              "model" = NA,    
                              "type" = NA,   
                              "unit" = NA,   
                              "icc.name" = NA,
                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  for(i in plot_freq_all_cols_names){
    
    data_frequency_all_selected_iterate <- data_frequency_all_selected %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_frequency_all_selected_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("comparison" = paste( a[1], "vs", a[2]),
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", a[1], "vs", a[2], ".csv", sep =" ")))
}


```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_2_Phen_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB_ICC}

## Publication Comparison 5_2: ICC for Phen Vein WB v Tasso WB

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_2_phenotypes_ICC_for_Phen_Vein_WB_v_Tasso_WB")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)


data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB")

# data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
#   filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
#   filter(Group == "Vein WB" | Group == "Tasso WB") %>%
#   filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

### Filter out low cell count sets

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

### Filter out low cell count sets

table(data_phen_all_selected$Donor, data_phen_all_selected$Group)
table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

plot_cols_names <- c(plot_phen_cols_names, "Count")

for (p in unique(data_phen_all_selected$Population)){
  print(p)
  
  data_phen_all_selected_pop <- data_phen_all_selected %>%
    filter(Population == {{p}})
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                              "comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA, 
                              "subjects" = NA, 
                              "raters" = NA, 
                              "model" = NA,    
                              "type" = NA,   
                              "unit" = NA,   
                              "icc.name" = NA,
                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  
  for(i in plot_cols_names){
    
    data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate <- data_phen_all_selected_pop %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                                "comparison" = "Vein WB v Tasso WB",
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", p, ".csv", sep =" ")))
}

```

```{r For_Puplication_comparisons_5_3_Phen_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped_ICC}

## Publication Comparison 5_3: ICC for Phen Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped

dir.plots_analysis <- file.path(dir.plots,"Puplication_Comparison_5_3_phenotypes_ICC_for_Tasso_WB_v_Tasso_WB_Shipped")
dir.create(dir.plots_analysis)


data_phen_all_selected <- data_phen_all %>%
  filter(Experiment == 3 & Donor != "SAC253053" & Group != "Vein PBMC Pre") %>%
  filter(Group == "Tasso WB" | Group == "Tasso WB Shipped") %>%
  filter(Donor %in% filtered_tasso_id)

sets_to_remove <- unique(data_phen_all_selected[data_phen_all_selected$Filter == TRUE,]$Donor_Population_Date)

  filter(Donor_Population_Date %notin% sets_to_remove)

table(data_phen_all_selected$Population, data_phen_all_selected$Group)

  print(p)

    filter(Population == {{p}})
  
  icc_aggregate <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                              "comparison" = NA,
                              "parameter" = NA,

                              "raters" = NA,

                              "value" = NA,
                              "r0" = NA,
                              "Fvalue" = NA,
                              "df1" = NA,
                              "df2" = NA,
                              "p.value" = NA,
                              "conf.level" = NA,
                              "lbound" = NA,
                              "ubound" = NA)
  icc_aggregate
  
  
  for(i in plot_phen_cols_names){
    
    data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate <- data_phen_all_selected_pop %>%
      select("Donor", "Group", {{i}}) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = {{i}})
    
    icc_value <- icc(ratings = data_phen_all_selected_pop_iterate %>% select(-"Donor"),
                   model = "twoway",
                   type = "agreement",
                   unit = "single",
                   conf.level = 0.95)
    
    parameter_icc <- data.frame("population" = NA,
                                "comparison" = "Tasso WB v Tasso WB Shipped",
                                "parameter" = i, 
                                "subjects" = icc_value$subjects,   
                                "raters" = icc_value$raters,     
                                "model" = icc_value$model, 
                                "type" = icc_value$type,       
                                "unit" = icc_value$unit,  
                                "icc.name" = icc_value$icc.name,
                                "value" = icc_value$value,
                                "r0" = icc_value$r0,
                                "Fvalue" = icc_value$Fvalue,
                                "df1" = icc_value$df1,
                                "df2" = icc_value$df2,
                                "p.value" = icc_value$p.value,
                                "conf.level" = icc_value$conf.level,
                                "lbound" = icc_value$lbound,
                                "ubound" = icc_value$ubound)
    
    icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate %>%
      bind_rows(parameter_icc)
    
    }
  
  icc_aggregate <- icc_aggregate[-1,]
  
  write.csv(icc_aggregate,
            file = file.path(dir.plots_analysis, paste("icc", p, ".csv", sep =" ")))
}
```
